name: io.github.wyre-technology/saas-alerts-mcp
title: SaaS Alerts
description: MCP server for Kaseya SaaS Alerts — SaaS security monitoring for M365 & Google Workspace.

environmentVariables.name: SAAS_ALERTS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: SaaS Alerts API key (sent as the api_key header). Required.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport mode. 'stdio' for local CLI; image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.

environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE
environmentVariables.description: 'env' reads vars locally; 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
